## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Send an email to '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happens instead.

## Environment

- MailTub version: (run `./bin/mailtub --version` or check Settings → About)
- OS: (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14)
- Browser: (e.g. Chrome 125, Firefox 126) — if frontend issue
- Deployment: (binary / Docker / other)
